subject: Mathematical Reasoning
worked_solution: 25% is one quarter; a quarter of 360 is 90.

subject: Mathematical Reasoning
question_text: What is the area of the shaded right triangle shown?
worked_solution: Area = ½ × base × height = ½ × 8 × 6 = 24 cm².
asset_alt_text: A right triangle with base 8 cm and height 6 cm

subject: Thinking Skills
question_text: Which shape is the odd one out?
worked_solution: A, B and C are rotations of the same figure; D is a reflection.
